title: ecbolium genuflexum
side_effects: Ecbolium genuflexum can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea and vomiting due to its toxic compounds, diarrhea caused by its high fiber content, and allergic reactions like hives or itching in sensitive individuals. In severe cases, improper use of ecbolium genuflexum can lead to more serious conditions, including respiratory distress, heart palpitations, and even liver or kidney damage. Furthermore, the plant's potent neurotoxins can cause tremors, seizures, and altered mental states if ingested in large quantities. If not handled correctly, the plant's side effects can be long-lasting and potentially life-threatening.
